review_title: CoPilot First Timer- Everything we needed and thensome.
description: CoPilot is helping us generate more leads and build a broader pipeline where we are able to foster interactions with a whole tool kit of features available on the platform. Our Account Strategist, [SENSITIVE CONTENT], has always gone above and beyond to meet our needs w/ training on the platform and is very responsive to our particular circumstances for our business helping us create a strong lead generation system from scratch, he is very much appreciated!
author: Steven W.
pros: I love the dashboard, the scheduling of messages, being able to snooze communications w/ prospects and leads.
cons: There are no cons about this software that we find. All is great!

review_title: AI with a different point of view
description: My overall experience has been positive because it is a flexible system that has easy tools pre-built into the system that allows for different modes of search and content creation.
author: Justin K.
pros: I like the CoPilot offers an alternative format to AI that is different from many of the other AI tools available.
cons: I don't like that sometimes results can be time consuming, and it doesn't always adjust to requests quickly especially when working with images and graphics.

review_title: Don’t use Growpilot | spend your money elsewhere
description: Growpilot was supposed to be an answer to finding qualified leads in top funnel outreach on LinkedIn. What I got was the opposite. From the jump, it was clear they didn’t take the time to understand what I do. I work in a nuanced space—advertising, production, branding—and the language, tone, and context are everything. They never learned the vocabulary, never studied my competitors, never adapted to my field. Instead, they sent out bland, misaligned messaging that attracted mostly spam accounts, people looking for jobs, or connections totally unrelated to my business. Not a single qualified lead. To make matters worse, I cycled through four account managers in six months. Each one disappeared with no warning. One day I’d be sharing updates, decks, and writing—and the next, their email would bounce. It was constant backtracking, onboarding new people, re-explaining everything. And even when I did my part—religiously providing materials, status updates, insights from my end—it felt like I was just shouting into the void. No one internalized anything. The work felt lazy. Zero research. Zero learning. Zero strategy. And I was locked into a contract (plus theSales Navigator account) for six months that all in ran me around $10000. That’s money that I could’ve used it to actually grow my business elsewhere. I raised my concerns professionally and repeatedly. I gave them a chance to fix it—asked for either a refund or a real redo, where they actually put in the effort. They gave me two more months of the same ineffective work. All in, it was one of the most frustrating vendor experiences I’ve ever had. This service wasted my time, wasted my money, and left me worse off than when I started. I strongly recommend thinking twice before signing on. If your time and brand matter to you, look elsewhere.
author: Dan B.
pros: The initial pitch was compelling, but beyond that not very much at all. It was a bad service.
cons: The execution was a disaster. They never truly understood my business, didn’t learn the language or context of my industry (creative services, advertising, entertainment), and made no effort to adapt or improve. •The leads were extremely rare and when something finally came up on my calendar, it would be wildly unqualified—mostly spam accounts, job seekers, not B2B buyers. •I lost multiple account managers without warning. Emails just started bouncing one day. No continuity, no communication. •Despite me consistently sharing updates, decks, writing, and doing my part, they seemed to do no research, no competitor analysis, and offered no actual strategy or improvement. •I was locked into a six-month minimum (plus the cost of Sales Navigator), and it yielded zero ROI. •When I raised concerns, they gave me a couple more months of the same ineffective service as a “solution.”

description: I am very pleased so far.
author: Shane H.
pros: The automation features. It is great to be able to customize my voice but have the sequencing automated. Love that! I love that once the automated software gets a response, I get to take over and manually communicate with prospects.
cons: sometimes too much of a one-size fits all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, Copilot AI has been a valuable tool for growing your network and reaching new leads on LinkedIn. It saves so much time which is super important if your a busy person like myself between working for a large company and having your own e-commerce business. You need all the tools to makes things go smoothly.
author: maza C.
pros: Copilot AI is a total game changer for LinkedIn hustling. It takes all the boring grunt work out of finding leads and hitting people up, so you can actually focus on having real convos and closing deals.
cons: The learning curve can be a bit steep for new users, especially when setting up more advanced campaigns. Sometimes the integrations with LinkedIn can be a bit finicky due to platform changes.

description: Terrible experience - wasted time and money
author: Tom B.
pros: None nothing good Just promise after promise
cons: No positive results Expected by month three 7-10 meetings booked
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Shady Billing Practices and a Frustrating Experience
description: I signed up for CopilotAI hoping it would streamline my outreach, but the platform turned out to be more of a headache than a help. But the worst part? They auto-renewed my subscription without any warning — no email reminder, no notification, nothing. When I contacted support about it, they flat-out refused to issue a refund, even though I hadn’t used the service during the new billing period. It feels dishonest and incredibly disappointing, especially for a company that markets itself as helping businesses grow. If you’re thinking about signing up, be very careful — and definitely read the fine print. I won’t be coming back. They refused to issue a refund.
author: Martin R.
pros: I gained a lot of new connections, but unfortunately, most of them weren’t relevant or valuable to my business goals.
cons: In reality, CopilotAI is basically a LinkedIn spam machine. Most of the messages it sent out got negative or no responses, and instead of helping me build relationships, I think it actually hurt my professional image. I ended up looking more like a spammer than a serious business contact — definitely not what I signed up for.

description: I have loved using this in my team meetings, one to ones and to summarize information to prepare for audits and for presentation. It makes my work so much easier.
author: Melissa S.
pros: It has been extremely helpful in our preparation for a state audit that we have coming up. Not only can it help to add spice and increased impact in writing, but also is able to organize the items underneath the proper heading that you assign. I had to do several staff interviews and it recorded these interviews. Then was able to allow me to put this into an improved formatting. Has saved me hours of work!
cons: I needed someone to show me how to use for the first time, but after this it was honestly very easy to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Copilot AI is like having your own personal assistant
description: CoPilot AI is like having your own personal assistant. You can ask it questions about a topic or ask for help writing out some paragraphs. It really expedites my everyday tasks.
author: Brenton T.
pros: Copilot AI is a great tool to aid in your everyday work. Its like having your own personal assistant.
cons: It took a while and a few try's to get the answers and responses I wanted out of CoPilot, however once you start using it more and more you work out the best prompts to use

review_title: Maybe not a fit if you're a small business
description: Beyond the disappointing ending, they were a great upgrade from really basic cheap LinkedIn automations like Duxsoup. They have not evolved with the market saturation from a technical level and sadly did not make up for it on customer success side.
author: Paul D.
pros: Great support team for bugs and information. Like the canned messages feature as well and general stats.
cons: In the DIY use-case, I didn't see their value relative to competitors who were priced lower. We were charged for a hefty billing cycle for clients we represent even after we well in advance unsubscribed via their dashboard. We were then told that we need to manually email them instead and they didn't budge on sticking to the fineprint. Short-sighted and frugal move which showed the true colours of how they look at agency partner relationships. They did offer a credit for the future but I hold my suppliers to a higher bar.

description: Phenomenal - from the top of the executive management team to the customer service. I've worked with not only [SENSITVE CONTENT] , but one other individual at CoPilot and the service has been wonderful - the people, all a dream to work with. I'm very happy to have taken the call with [SENSITVE CONTENT] years ago.
author: Adam K.
pros: There's almost too much to mention: - Ability to customize messaging to my liking - Ability to customize when messages are sent, down to the minute - Ability to change focus/niche at any given time - The dashboard/interface is VERY easy to use - Ability to "nurture" past contacts over time, although there have been issues with this feature. - Most of all, the customer service -[SENSITVE CONTENT]has been incredible to work with.
cons: Only one thing - the Nurture campaign has had issues and I lost a LOT of time during the implementation process due to these technological problems. We should've had it up and running no later than January, but problems with the back end of the software development took months to understand. Although everything seems to be running smoothly now (i.e - the problem WAS remedied), I wish we could've been nurturing these prospective clients back in January vs. when it actually started working.

description: When I first started Co-pilot, I saw some results, however, I thought of quitting it. I am so glad that I did not. It is so critical for my business and this is where I get my leads from. I love the support that I get from Co-pilot and tweak what is not working for me and I am able to connect with the clients that I am trying to attract. I was referred to Co-pilot through a cold call that I received and he explained to me how he found my name. I am so thankful for this software. It has been my best marketing tool so far! I love it!!
author: Deborah A.
pros: I love the software because it finds potential clients for me. It narrows down the exact client base that I am searching for. I love the support that I get in helping me set up the software and manage it.
cons: I love the software and feel that I do not use it to the fullest capacity; however the portion that I do use is extremely critical to me.

review_title: Solid program for a critical part of my business
description: I've made a significant number of clients in the past year utilizing CoPilot, generating an impressive amount of revenue.
author: Eric B.
pros: Compared to other similar products in the marketplace, I find this to be the best value. The stat tracking, ease of use, customer service are all outstanding.
cons: I would like if it could utilize InMail, and if it automatically categorized folks into more than yes/no/maybe for interest level. I feel like the use of "AI" may be a very liberal use of the term, but again the value is tremendous.

review_title: Great value & resource for business owners wanting to expand their client base
description: Working with CoPilot AI has been an exceptional experience from the start. Their customer support team is best-in-class, offering direct and personalized attention every step of the way. I absolutely love working with [SENSITIVE CONTENT]. The team understands marketing trends and consumer behaviors and uses these insights to support you with the best possible strategy and approach for your business. The software is easy to navigate and use, the automations seamless which all means I don't have to spend more than a few minutes per day checking in and communicating with potential new clients. Sometimes I have more than I know what to do with! I couldn't recommend CoPilot AI enough to business owners interested in growing their professional network and client base with ease.
author: Stephanie H.
pros: I love how seamless CoPilot integrates with LinkedIn. It's connected us to some of our best partnerships, clients, and new hires and has grown our network tenfold.
cons: Nothing that I can think of at the moment.

author: Ramez F.
pros: The simplicity of reaching out on my behalf is what makes copilot worth it. I no longer need the hassle of writing three different messages for each and every potential prospect. Time is my greatest asset and that's what Copilot delivers, my time to do more. After all, there are only 24 hours in a day.
cons: Truth be told and not Copilot's fault, but we spent the first three months finding out what works. So if there was a real issue, customizing the message is key to generating leads. Basically, you can't judge copilot the first few months because beta tests your messaging is key to see what works best for you.

review_title: Very efficient tool to generate leads.
description: Overall I've been very happy with this tool which has initiated conversations leading to 5 new households totalling approximately $3.3M in new assets.
author: Sheena S.
pros: That it doesn't take much time to maintain conversations with new leads. It basically works for me in the background as I carry on with my normal day.
cons: There have been some issues with glitches along the way. Snoozed prospects don't always reappear in my inbox and I have to search them to find the previous conversations.

description: Overall great, set & forget it tool for growing contacts. Haven't used the Nurture tool yet, though I see how it could be an amazing addition. Customer support has always been easy to contact & timely in their responses as well.
author: tracy S.
pros: Ease of growing targeted connections without having to send the messages & auto-follow up myself
cons: the personal follow-up messaging & filtering/grouping are both clunky

review_title: Our number one prospecting tool & lead capture
author: Shawn W.
pros: I like the personal outreach abilities of the messages. They do an excellent job starting conversations.
cons: I wish the platform allowed us to search contacts better at times. There are times that we click to search for a contact and it does not pull up. But we can later find it. It seems that the instant search gives up too soon especially if the date range is too broad.

description: My overall experience with copilot has been great due to the support from my representative [SENSITIVE CONTENT]. She is responsive, attentive and extremely knowledgeable in resolving any issue that come up. She is the best!!!
author: Chuck D.
pros: Ease of reaching out to prospects as opposed to doing it manually.
cons: Snooze feature doesn't work as it was explained.

description: This product has been very useful to our organization and taught the team the value of increasing contacts. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been a great mentor to the FWSales team. This includes our summer intern and she has reflected back to her student team.
author: Frank W.
pros: Number of contacts generated per month and automated touches.
cons: Limit to the number of contacts per month.

review_title: Great tool for busy BD professionals
description: Great client advisor as [SENSITIVE CONTENT] really helped make each step a success.
author: Claudia L.
pros: The automation makes prospecting a breeze, to increase activities and to filter out none-interested leads. It fully utilizes the filtered sales navigator leads and then them into actionable contacts.
cons: I wish there is an easy plug to convert data and activities and messages into my own CRM.

description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been extremely helpful and responsive with any problems that arose.
author: Ramez G.
pros: I really like the automation of CoPilot. It helped me reach a large number of leads and cut down on hours of manual work.
cons: One small thing is the snooze feature. If there is an alert on the date a lead was snoozed or if it re-appears in the card view of the inbox that would be helpful.

description: excellent. great product - solid team.
author: Marc R.
pros: Easy to use. effective. works well for people who are busy and need something working for them in the background.
cons: co-pilot online portal could be a little more user friendly and have less of a lag between what happens in linkedin premium and when it shows up in co-pilot.

author: Brandon S.
pros: Easy to use and nice it is all on its own platform. Good support.
cons: Occasional software issues as expected with a newer company.

description: I'm still in the beginning stages of using it. I will know more after one year.
author: Charles P.
pros: It has build up my LinkedIn contacts from appx 250 to 1200 in 6 months. It is connecting me to people I want to do business with.
cons: No phone app to use on the go. Not being able to use it with the linkedIn app as far as messages.
